news.headline: Co-founder of Rarible discusses challenges of NFT market at Benzinga event, warns against speculative practices in loyalty programs.
news.summary: During the Benzinga Future of Digital Assets event, Alex Salnikov, co-founder and chief strategy officer of Rarible, participated in a panel discussion with Ian Horne, head of content for Money20/20 Amsterdam. The conversation centered on the opportunities and challenges of incorporating non-fungible tokens (NFTs) into brand loyalty strategies within the growing Web3 ecosystem. Salnikov highlighted the negative impact of speculative practices in 2021, which led to skepticism towards NFT technology. He noted that the market was flooded with short-term profit schemes, creating a bubble and tarnishing the image of NFTs in many communities. Salnikov drew parallels to the recent trend of meme coins and cautioned that similar patterns could generate temporary interest but pose long-term obstacles for the industry.

Philip Vieira has joined Needham Bank as Vice President, Senior Small Business Relationship Manager. Reported on Dec. 4, 2024.
news.summary: Needham Bank, located in Needham, Massachusetts, has recently welcomed Philip Vieira to their Commercial & Industrial Lending team as the Vice President and Senior Small Business Relationship Manager. Vieira will report to Brian Sutton, the Senior Vice President and Director of Middle management. The addition of Vieira aims to bolster the bank's services in small business lending, marking an important move in their growth strategy.

news.headline: Avelo Airlines expands in North Carolina with 10 new routes, 27 total, $44 fares, 5 aircraft, 100 jobs.
news.summary: Avelo Airlines has announced the addition of 10 new routes, bringing the total number of nonstop routes from North Carolina to 27. They will be offering affordable one-way fares starting at $44. Additionally, Avelo will be stationing five aircraft in North Carolina, potentially generating up to 100 new jobs in the area. The expansion showcases Avelo's dedication to enhancing their services and reach in the region.

news.headline: Oak View Group (OVG) launches DE&I Career Readiness Program, ASCEND, at CFG Bank Arena in Baltimore on 12/13 for underrepresented students. Equips with skills, mentorship in sports, entertainment, and hospitality.
news.summary: A recently launched initiative led by Oak View Group (OVG) is focused on providing underrepresented students with essential skills, mentorship, and practical experience in the fields of sports, entertainment, and hospitality. The Career Readiness Program, which commenced in Denver on December 4, 2024, aims to assist students in gaining valuable insights and knowledge to excel in these industries. news.headline: Age of Union commits $287,000 to The Juma Institute for Amazon protection and new knowledge center.

news.headline: Global Treasury and Risk Management Software market reached $5.3B in 2023, projected to hit $10.8B by 2030, growing at 10.9% CAGR. - ResearchAndMarkets.
news.summary: An updated report on Treasury and Risk Management Software is now available for purchase at ResearchAndMarkets.com. The global market for this software was valued at approximately US$5.3 billion in 2023, with projections suggesting a growth to US$10.8 billion by 2030. This represents a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 10.9% from 2023 to 2030. The report offers a detailed analysis of market trends, drivers, and forecasts to assist businesses in making well-informed decisions about this sector.

news.headline: UBS expresses shock over comparing trial to Mafia, as whistleblower reveals harassment. #WhistleblowerTrial #UBS
High Roller Technologies reports Q3 2024 financial results.
Forrester report states B2B buying process is complicated, with 86% purchases stalling and 81% buyers dissatisfied.
news.summary: In Cambridge, Massachusetts, the latest report from Forrester (Nasdaq: FORR) titled The State Of Business Buying, 2024 reveals challenging trends. Tight budgets, the impact of AI on transactions, poor buying experiences, and lengthy purchase cycles are making B2B purchasing more complex. The report highlights that presently, 86% of B2B transactions face delays during the buying phase, with a significant 81% of buyers voicing discontent with their selected vendors. Furthermore, buyers are increasingly dependent on self-service options and automated services.

This acquisition, along with restructuring efforts at its Core Optics subsidiary and planned funding activities, positions Coretec as a major player in the global energy and technology sectors.

news.summary: FortiSASE received exceptional ratings in all four assessment criteria, showcasing its capability to provide strong cloud-based security measures while maintaining optimal network efficiency.

news.headline: Finantsinspektsioon maintains Coop Pank AS capital requirements after its annual review. Pillar 2 requirement stays unchanged.

The decision, issued on 02.12.2024, affirms that Coop Pank AS must continue to operate with its current capital levels as specified in the regulatory framework.

news.headline: AI is not yielding desired results at many firms due to lack of strategic goals; L.E.K. study reveals.
news.summary: A recent study conducted by L.E.K. Consulting in Boston on Dec. 4, 2024, highlights that a considerable number of businesses are not fully utilizing the potential of AI transformation. The study reveals that many companies are adopting a "hackathon" approach rather than a strategy led by CEOs that focuses on specific strategic goals. This approach is impeding the successful integration of AI technologies in businesses. It is crucial for companies to shift towards a CEO-led strategy to leverage the benefits of the artificial intelligence revolution.

news.headline: Global shift to green energy increasing copper demand faster than expected, risking shortages.
news.summary: News Commentary provided by Usha Resources Ltd. highlights the escalating transition to green energy worldwide. However, experts caution that a potential copper deficit could hinder endeavors to facilitate sustainable and clean energy production. This concern arises amidst the increased demand for copper in various renewable energy technologies. The commentary emphasizes the urgent need for strategic planning and investment to address this issue effectively.

news.headline: Positive results of MRGPRX2 antagonist EVO756 presented at forum with 132 subjects, showing safety, efficacy, and dosing potential for urticaria patients.
news.summary: A trial testing the effectiveness of EVO756 in 132 participants showed promising results. The drug exhibited a strong safety record, high efficacy, and favorable pharmacokinetics which suggest it can be taken once daily orally. These findings indicate the potential for EVO756 to be a leading treatment option for a wide range of patients.

news.headline: 72% of independent contract nurses also work full/part-time jobs. Nursa survey of 2,000 nurses across 44 states examines career trends.
news.summary: Nursa, a platform aiming to connect nurses with patients in need, released survey results analyzing the work preferences of over 2,000 registered nurses, licensed practical nurses, and certified nurse assistants from 44 states. The survey sheds light on career trends for nurses choosing per diem work. This initiative seeks to address the demand for flexible healthcare solutions.
